home.title: Field status, built for the phone in your hand
home.body: Monitor farms, bind devices, act on alerts, and give resellers scoped support access without exposing customer data.
home.panelTitle: One protected workspace for farms, devices, alerts, and field support.

secure.label: Farm data stays inside its boundary

customers.title: Customers monitor and act
customers.body: Farm owners can see device status, acknowledge alerts, invite members, and provision hardware from the same portal.

resellers.title: Resellers support within scope
resellers.body: Reseller access is assigned per farm, audited, and limited so support work does not become customer data ownership.

operators.title: Operators keep the fleet healthy
operators.body: Ops users can review open alerts, command history, notification readiness, and device health from one console.

home.ctaTitle: Create an account, then add a farm before binding the first device.
home.ctaBody: The production flow keeps identity, farm membership, notification settings, and provisioning in the same permission model.

auth.setupPending: Supabase Auth env is not configured for the frontend yet
auth.forgotPasswordBody: Enter your email and we will send a secure password reset link.
auth.resetPasswordBody: Set a new password after opening the secure reset link from your email.
auth.portalTitle: One account for farms, devices, and alerts
auth.portalBody: Sign in to monitor field devices, bind QR codes, and manage farm permissions from a mobile-first dashboard.

dashboard.title: Farm overview
dashboard.authPending: The dashboard route is guarded, but login is deferred until NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY are configured.
dashboard.emptyBody: Next up: connect device and farm APIs through session-aware RLS.
dashboard.noFarms: No farms are visible for this account yet.
dashboard.noDevices: No devices are visible for this account yet.

placeholder.provisionBody: Scan or paste the QR payload, confirm the device, choose an owned farm, and bind it through the secured provisioning flow.
placeholder.opsBody: Review fleet health, open alerts, command activity, and notification readiness from the operator console.
placeholder.deviceBody: Review latest telemetry, alert state, command history, and permitted device actions.

provision.stateBody: Device and farm scope are checked before binding.
provision.noOwnedFarms: This account has no owner-scoped farm available for binding yet.
provision.startWithQr: Paste the QR payload or device ID to continue.
provision.resolveFirst: Resolve the device before choosing a farm.
provision.alreadyBoundBody: This device is already bound to a farm.

farmSettings.body: Manage farm members, reseller scope, notification preferences, and audit visibility.
farmSettings.notFoundBody: This farm is not visible to the current session.
farmSettings.viewOnly: You can view this farm, but you cannot manage members or reseller scope.

farmCreate.title: Create a farm
farmCreate.body: Set up the customer farm boundary before binding devices or inviting members.
farmCreate.name: Farm name

inviteAccept.title: Join a farm
inviteAccept.body: Accept the invite with the same email address the farm owner invited.
inviteAccept.created: Invite created. Copy this link now; it is shown only briefly.

deviceDetail.body: Monitor latest telemetry, alerts, battery state, and permitted actions for this device.
deviceDetail.notFoundBody: This device is not visible to the current session.
deviceDetail.riskNotice: This command can interrupt the device. Confirm before queuing it.
deviceDetail.confirmBody: This will queue {command} for the device and write an audit entry.
deviceDetail.commandViewOnly: You can view this device, but you cannot send commands.
deviceDetail.alertConfirmBody: This will {action} the alert and write an audit entry.
deviceDetail.noAlerts: No alerts found for this device.

ops.title: Fleet operations
ops.body: Monitor fleet health, open alerts, command activity, and notification contact coverage.
ops.notAuthorized: This page is available only to admin/operator users.
ops.noDevices: No devices are visible to this operator session.
ops.noFarms: No farms are visible to this operator session.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.body: Choose the display name and language this browser should use across the portal.
